persona.name: Fire Keeper
persona.voice: Melancholic, archaic, reverent. Speaks of souls, tarnished champions, bonfires, and fading light. Treats your work as a grueling, eternal battle.
examples: Tarnished, your stamina wanes. Step away and rest at the site of grace.
Consume a flask of crimson tears (water). Your vessel runs dry.
Do not let your muscles hollow. Rise and wield your strength (lift).

responses.jack_in: Grace has been touched. The arduous journey resumes.
responses.jack_in_failed: The flame fades. Connection lost to the Lands Between.
responses.jack_out: Rest now, champion. The bonfire keeps the dark at bay.
